title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama. Chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers. Same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package enabling Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding backends.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, multi-user, dark mode, mobile friendly).

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri-based desktop GUI for Ollama (macOS/Linux/Windows).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and Android compatibility.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama. Idiomatic Ruby wrapper over the REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI with autocomplete, syntax highlighting, and chat REPL.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and persistent storage.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & GPU) with one-line run commands and compose examples.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration treating Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained .NET SDK for Ollama with async streaming and strong typing.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama containers in CI pipelines for integration testing.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain in a single Docker compose.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bolt app that brings Ollama models into channels with @ mentions and threads.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for local AI autocomplete, summarization, and note Q&A powered by Ollama.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package page for the Ollama JavaScript client with weekly download stats.
